blended.narrative: Pico Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
